raw_consumer_statement: I made a purchase for XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX. The purchase had XXXX  months no interest if paid in full. I was short XXXX on my last payment on XXXX of XXXX and was charged XXXX in interest. I called the Citi and asked for a one time waive of the fee or reduced fee. they said it was company policy not to waive the interest fee.
